---
title: "Jeffrey Hsu"
subtitle: "MS in Digital Marketing | Marketing Analytics and Strategy"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: "Jeffrey Hsu Passport Photo (PRINTED).png"
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/hsujeffrey
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/
format: html
---

I am currently pursuing a **Master of Science in Digital Marketing** at **Cal Poly Pomona**, where I am building skills in marketing analytics, dashboards, digital strategy, and data storytelling.

## Career Aspirations

My goal is to build a career in **marketing analytics and digital strategy**, where I can combine data analysis with business decision-making. I am particularly interested in roles that involve performance marketing, content strategy, and data-driven optimization.

I want to work in an environment where I can:
- Analyze marketing performance data to drive decisions  
- Build dashboards and reports that influence strategy  
- Use tools like R, Quarto, and analytics platforms to improve business outcomes  

## Skills

### Marketing & Analytics
- KPI analysis and performance tracking  
- Content and social media analysis  
- Campaign evaluation and optimization  

### Technical Skills
- R programming (data cleaning, modeling, visualization)  
- Quarto (dashboards and website publishing)  
- Data visualization and reporting  

### Communication
- Translating data into actionable insights  
- Presenting findings to non-technical audiences  
- Structuring analysis into clear business narratives  

## Education

**California State Polytechnic University, Pomona**  
Master of Science in Digital Marketing  

## Experience

Through my coursework and projects, I have developed experience creating dashboards, analyzing content performance, and presenting insights in a professional format.
